compiled_state.title: Jira and Figma integrations not reliably prompted during onboarding
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: During onboarding, the Jira and Figma integration setup sections are sometimes skipped without prompting the user. Both integrations should always prompt the user for configuration — they are not optional sections. Observed in beta testing: users completed onboarding without being asked about Jira or Figma.
